title: ddg.fr
summary:
Here are the most important distinct regulatory actions and developments concerning AI training data, AI crawlers, content licensing, or generative AI and copyright from the last 30 days:

### European Parliament Adopts Resolution on Copyright and Generative AI

The European Parliament adopted a resolution on March 10, 2026, outlining its position on safeguarding creators' rights while promoting AI development. The resolution calls for a strengthened legal framework, including transparency obligations for AI developers regarding copyrighted content used in training, and advocates for a coheren
